description: Nhìn nhanh OTIF cấp đơn của TMS report #25 (mv_mdlz_tms_report_25_order): freshness + tổng đơn/chuyến + 3 KPI RAG + đơn Failed OTIF + trend + breakdown theo NVC/Kho/Tỉnh/Loại xe. Công thức canonical (order-level) theo mondelez/02-data/audit-results/tms-report-25-order-mv-20260528.md §4.1 (mẫu số loại 'Not Evaluable', scope master_status_has_active=1). Target/RAG ở thresholds, KHÔNG trong SQL.

spec.rawSql: SELECT dateDiff('minute', max(_refreshed_at), now()) AS lag_min, toString(max(tendered_date_vn)) AS max_date FROM analytics_workspace.mv_mdlz_tms_report_25_order

spec.description: Lag = phút từ lần MV refresh gần nhất (_refreshed_at) tới now. MV REFRESH EVERY 1 HOUR → lag bình thường < ~60′. max_date = ngày gửi thầu lớn nhất đang có.
spec.title: Freshness — data tới max_date, trễ ~lag′ (MV refresh 1h)

spec.rawSql: SELECT count() AS so_don FROM analytics_workspace.mv_mdlz_tms_report_25_order WHERE $__timeFilter(${date_col}) AND master_status_has_active = 1 AND $__conditionalAll(stock_name IN (${kho:singlequote}), $kho) AND $__conditionalAll(vendor_short_name IN (${nvc:singlequote}), $nvc) AND $__conditionalAll(ops_location_to_province IN (${tinh:singlequote}), $tinh)

spec.description: Số đơn (1 row = 1 OrderCode) trong window, scope master_status_has_active=1 (có chuyến Đã hoàn thành/Đang vận chuyển — notebook L1).
spec.title: Tổng đơn (count OrderCode, scope active)

spec.rawSql: SELECT uniqExact(mc) AS so_chuyen FROM (SELECT arrayJoin(master_codes) AS mc FROM analytics_workspace.mv_mdlz_tms_report_25_order WHERE $__timeFilter(${date_col}) AND master_status_has_active = 1 AND $__conditionalAll(stock_name IN (${kho:singlequote}), $kho) AND $__conditionalAll(vendor_short_name IN (${nvc:singlequote}), $nvc) AND $__conditionalAll(ops_location_to_province IN (${tinh:singlequote}), $tinh))

spec.description: Số chuyến UNIQUE = uniqExact(arrayJoin(master_codes)) — đếm không trùng dù 1 chuyến chở nhiều đơn (caveat §5.2 audit).
spec.title: Tổng chuyến (uniqExact MasterCode)

spec.rawSql: SELECT round(100.0*countIf(otif_status='OTIF Pass')/nullIf(countIf(otif_status!='Not Evaluable'),0),2) AS pct_otif FROM analytics_workspace.mv_mdlz_tms_report_25_order WHERE $__timeFilter(${date_col}) AND master_status_has_active = 1 AND $__conditionalAll(stock_name IN (${kho:singlequote}), $kho) AND $__conditionalAll(vendor_short_name IN (${nvc:singlequote}), $nvc) AND $__conditionalAll(ops_location_to_province IN (${tinh:singlequote}), $tinh)

spec.description: % OTIF cấp đơn = đơn 'OTIF Pass' / đơn evaluable (loại 'Not Evaluable'). Định nghĩa order-level (1 chuyến trễ → cả đơn fail), strict hơn line-level (audit §5.1).
spec.title: % OTIF (mục tiêu 90%)

spec.rawSql: SELECT round(100.0*countIf(ontime_status='Ontime')/nullIf(countIf(ontime_status IN ('Ontime','Failed Ontime')),0),2) AS pct_ontime FROM analytics_workspace.mv_mdlz_tms_report_25_order WHERE $__timeFilter(${date_col}) AND master_status_has_active = 1 AND $__conditionalAll(stock_name IN (${kho:singlequote}), $kho) AND $__conditionalAll(vendor_short_name IN (${nvc:singlequote}), $nvc) AND $__conditionalAll(ops_location_to_province IN (${tinh:singlequote}), $tinh)

spec.description: % Ontime = đơn 'Ontime' / đơn đã chấm được Ontime (Ontime + Failed Ontime). Ontime = đến ≤ ETA + 30′ trên mọi chuyến.
spec.title: % Ontime (mục tiêu 95%)

spec.rawSql: SELECT round(100.0*countIf(infull_status='Infull')/nullIf(countIf(infull_status IN ('Infull','Failed Infull')),0),2) AS pct_infull FROM analytics_workspace.mv_mdlz_tms_report_25_order WHERE $__timeFilter(${date_col}) AND master_status_has_active = 1 AND $__conditionalAll(stock_name IN (${kho:singlequote}), $kho) AND $__conditionalAll(vendor_short_name IN (${nvc:singlequote}), $nvc) AND $__conditionalAll(ops_location_to_province IN (${tinh:singlequote}), $tinh)

spec.description: % Infull = đơn 'Infull' / đơn đã chấm được Infull (Infull + Failed Infull). Infull = sum(QuantityBBGN) ≥ max(QuantityOrder).
spec.title: % Infull (mục tiêu 97%)

spec.rawSql: SELECT order_code AS "Mã đơn", toString(tendered_date_vn) AS "Ngày gửi thầu", otif_status AS "OTIF", ontime_status AS "Ontime", infull_status AS "Infull", ifNull(late_phut_max, 0) AS "Trễ tối đa (phút)", round(kh_qty,2) AS "KH", round(gn_qty,2) AS "GN", round(chenh_qty,2) AS "Δ", vendor_short_name AS "NVC", stock_name AS "Kho", ops_location_to_province AS "Tỉnh giao", arrayStringConcat(master_codes, ', ') AS "Chuyến" FROM analytics_workspace.mv_mdlz_tms_report_25_order WHERE $__timeFilter(${date_col}) AND master_status_has_active = 1 AND otif_status IN ('Failed Ontime','Failed Infull','Failed Both') AND $__conditionalAll(stock_name IN (${kho:singlequote}), $kho) AND $__conditionalAll(vendor_short_name IN (${nvc:singlequote}), $nvc) AND $__conditionalAll(ops_location_to_province IN (${tinh:singlequote}), $tinh) ORDER BY late_phut_max DESC NULLS LAST, chenh_qty ASC LIMIT 200

spec.description: Đơn KHÔNG đạt OTIF (Failed Ontime / Failed Infull / Failed Both) trong window — trễ nặng nhất lên đầu (audit §4.2). Δ = GN − KH (âm = giao thiếu). Mỗi cột có ô filter.
spec.title: Đơn Failed OTIF — trễ nặng nhất trước (200 đơn) · gõ mã/NVC/kho ở ô lọc cột

spec.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfDay(${date_col}) AS time, round(100.0*countIf(otif_status='OTIF Pass')/nullIf(countIf(otif_status!='Not Evaluable'),0),2) AS "% OTIF", round(100.0*countIf(ontime_status='Ontime')/nullIf(countIf(ontime_status IN ('Ontime','Failed Ontime')),0),2) AS "% Ontime", round(100.0*countIf(infull_status='Infull')/nullIf(countIf(infull_status IN ('Infull','Failed Infull')),0),2) AS "% Infull" FROM analytics_workspace.mv_mdlz_tms_report_25_order WHERE $__timeFilter(${date_col}) AND master_status_has_active = 1 AND $__conditionalAll(stock_name IN (${kho:singlequote}), $kho) AND $__conditionalAll(vendor_short_name IN (${nvc:singlequote}), $nvc) AND $__conditionalAll(ops_location_to_province IN (${tinh:singlequote}), $tinh) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

spec.description: Trend daily order-level. Mẫu số loại 'Not Evaluable' (khớp KPI cards). Đường xanh = target 90 (OTIF). Dưới đường = chưa đạt.
spec.title: Xu hướng %OTIF/Ontime/Infull theo ngày — đường xanh = target 90%

spec.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfDay(${date_col}) AS time, count() AS "Số đơn" FROM analytics_workspace.mv_mdlz_tms_report_25_order WHERE $__timeFilter(${date_col}) AND master_status_has_active = 1 AND $__conditionalAll(stock_name IN (${kho:singlequote}), $kho) AND $__conditionalAll(vendor_short_name IN (${nvc:singlequote}), $nvc) AND $__conditionalAll(ops_location_to_province IN (${tinh:singlequote}), $tinh) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

spec.description: Số đơn mỗi ngày (scope active). Spike/hụt volume giúp đọc bối cảnh khi %OTIF dao động.
spec.title: Tổng đơn theo ngày — volume context cho trend

spec.rawSql: SELECT chieu, gia_tri, total_eval, otif_so, (total_eval - otif_so) AS fail_so, pct_otif FROM ( SELECT 'NVC' AS chieu, multiIf(vendor_short_name='','(rỗng)', vendor_short_name) AS gia_tri, countIf(otif_status!='Not Evaluable') AS total_eval, countIf(otif_status='OTIF Pass') AS otif_so, round(100.0*countIf(otif_status='OTIF Pass')/nullIf(countIf(otif_status!='Not Evaluable'),0),2) AS pct_otif FROM analytics_workspace.mv_mdlz_tms_report_25_order WHERE $__timeFilter(${date_col}) AND master_status_has_active = 1 AND $__conditionalAll(stock_name IN (${kho:singlequote}), $kho) AND $__conditionalAll(vendor_short_name IN (${nvc:singlequote}), $nvc) AND $__conditionalAll(ops_location_to_province IN (${tinh:singlequote}), $tinh) GROUP BY gia_tri UNION ALL SELECT 'Kho' AS chieu, multiIf(stock_name='','(rỗng)', stock_name) AS gia_tri, countIf(otif_status!='Not Evaluable') AS total_eval, countIf(otif_status='OTIF Pass') AS otif_so, round(100.0*countIf(otif_status='OTIF Pass')/nullIf(countIf(otif_status!='Not Evaluable'),0),2) AS pct_otif FROM analytics_workspace.mv_mdlz_tms_report_25_order WHERE $__timeFilter(${date_col}) AND master_status_has_active = 1 AND $__conditionalAll(stock_name IN (${kho:singlequote}), $kho) AND $__conditionalAll(vendor_short_name IN (${nvc:singlequote}), $nvc) AND $__conditionalAll(ops_location_to_province IN (${tinh:singlequote}), $tinh) GROUP BY gia_tri UNION ALL SELECT 'Tỉnh giao' AS chieu, multiIf(ops_location_to_province='','(rỗng)', ops_location_to_province) AS gia_tri, countIf(otif_status!='Not Evaluable') AS total_eval, countIf(otif_status='OTIF Pass') AS otif_so, round(100.0*countIf(otif_status='OTIF Pass')/nullIf(countIf(otif_status!='Not Evaluable'),0),2) AS pct_otif FROM analytics_workspace.mv_mdlz_tms_report_25_order WHERE $__timeFilter(${date_col}) AND master_status_has_active = 1 AND $__conditionalAll(stock_name IN (${kho:singlequote}), $kho) AND $__conditionalAll(vendor_short_name IN (${nvc:singlequote}), $nvc) AND $__conditionalAll(ops_location_to_province IN (${tinh:singlequote}), $tinh) GROUP BY gia_tri UNION ALL SELECT 'Loại xe' AS chieu, multiIf(group_of_vehicle_name='','(rỗng)', group_of_vehicle_name) AS gia_tri, countIf(otif_status!='Not Evaluable') AS total_eval, countIf(otif_status='OTIF Pass') AS otif_so, round(100.0*countIf(otif_status='OTIF Pass')/nullIf(countIf(otif_status!='Not Evaluable'),0),2) AS pct_otif FROM analytics_workspace.mv_mdlz_tms_report_25_order WHERE $__timeFilter(${date_col}) AND master_status_has_active = 1 AND $__conditionalAll(stock_name IN (${kho:singlequote}), $kho) AND $__conditionalAll(vendor_short_name IN (${nvc:singlequote}), $nvc) AND $__conditionalAll(ops_location_to_province IN (${tinh:singlequote}), $tinh) GROUP BY gia_tri ) WHERE pct_otif < 90 AND total_eval >= 5 ORDER BY pct_otif ASC, total_eval DESC LIMIT 20

spec.description: Exception Spotlight: gộp 4 chiều NVC / Kho / Tỉnh giao / Loại xe, chỉ giữ nhóm %OTIF < 90% và ≥5 đơn evaluable, tệ nhất trước. fail_so = đơn KHÔNG đạt OTIF trong nhóm. total_eval = đơn đã chấm được (loại Not Evaluable).
spec.title: Chiều đang kéo OTIF xuống — cross-dim < 90% (worst-first, ≥5 đơn)

spec.rawSql: SELECT multiIf(stock_name='','(rỗng)', stock_name) AS "Kho", round(100.0*countIf(otif_status='OTIF Pass')/nullIf(countIf(otif_status!='Not Evaluable'),0),2) AS "% OTIF" FROM analytics_workspace.mv_mdlz_tms_report_25_order WHERE $__timeFilter(${date_col}) AND master_status_has_active = 1 AND $__conditionalAll(stock_name IN (${kho:singlequote}), $kho) AND $__conditionalAll(vendor_short_name IN (${nvc:singlequote}), $nvc) AND $__conditionalAll(ops_location_to_province IN (${tinh:singlequote}), $tinh) GROUP BY "Kho" HAVING countIf(otif_status!='Not Evaluable') >= 5 ORDER BY "% OTIF" ASC LIMIT 20

spec.description: %OTIF theo kho xuất (≥5 đơn evaluable), thấp nhất trước. Đỏ < 85% cần can thiệp.
spec.title: %OTIF theo kho — đỏ < 85% cần can thiệp

spec.rawSql: SELECT multiIf(group_of_vehicle_name='','(rỗng)', group_of_vehicle_name) AS "Loại xe", count() AS "Số đơn" FROM analytics_workspace.mv_mdlz_tms_report_25_order WHERE $__timeFilter(${date_col}) AND master_status_has_active = 1 AND $__conditionalAll(stock_name IN (${kho:singlequote}), $kho) AND $__conditionalAll(vendor_short_name IN (${nvc:singlequote}), $nvc) AND $__conditionalAll(ops_location_to_province IN (${tinh:singlequote}), $tinh) GROUP BY "Loại xe" ORDER BY "Số đơn" DESC LIMIT 20

spec.description: Phân bố số đơn theo loại xe (group_of_vehicle_name) — đọc cơ cấu phương tiện trong window.
spec.title: Số đơn theo loại xe — cơ cấu phương tiện

spec.rawSql: SELECT order_code AS "Mã đơn", toString(tendered_date_vn) AS "Ngày gửi thầu", otif_status AS "OTIF", ontime_status AS "Ontime", infull_status AS "Infull", service_of_order_name AS "Dịch vụ", order_status AS "Trạng thái đơn", customer_name AS "Khách hàng", vendor_short_name AS "NVC", stock_name AS "Kho", ops_location_to_name AS "Điểm giao", ops_location_to_province AS "Tỉnh", so_chuyen AS "Số chuyến", round(kh_qty,2) AS "KH", round(gn_qty,2) AS "GN", round(chenh_qty,2) AS "Δ", ifNull(late_phut_max,0) AS "Trễ (phút)", ifNull(formatDateTime(toTimeZone(eta,'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh'),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'),'—') AS "ETA", ifNull(formatDateTime(toTimeZone(date_to_come_max,'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh'),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'),'—') AS "Giao thực tế", wms_match_status AS "WMS" FROM analytics_workspace.mv_mdlz_tms_report_25_order WHERE $__timeFilter(${date_col}) AND $__conditionalAll(stock_name IN (${kho:singlequote}), $kho) AND $__conditionalAll(vendor_short_name IN (${nvc:singlequote}), $nvc) AND $__conditionalAll(ops_location_to_province IN (${tinh:singlequote}), $tinh) ORDER BY ${date_col} DESC LIMIT 5000

spec.description: Drill cấp đơn — MỌI đơn trong window (KHÔNG lọc master_status_has_active, để tra cả đơn Chờ/Chưa giao). Mỗi cột có ô filter. Ngày hiển thị giờ Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh. Giới hạn 5000 đơn mới nhất theo Loại ngày đang chọn.
spec.title: Chi tiết đơn TMS #25 — tra cứu nhanh (gõ mã ở ô lọc cột) · 5000 đơn mới nhất
Chi tiết đơn TMS #25 (drill — bung khi cần tra)

title: TMS #25 Order Quick View — Mondelez

spec.label: Loại ngày
spec.name: date_col
spec.query: Ngày gửi thầu : tendered_date_vn,Ngày giao thực tế (DateToCome) : date_to_come_max,Ngày tạo đơn : order_created_date,ETA : eta

spec.__legacyStringValue: SELECT DISTINCT stock_name FROM analytics_workspace.mv_mdlz_tms_report_25_order WHERE stock_name != '' ORDER BY stock_name
SELECT DISTINCT vendor_short_name FROM analytics_workspace.mv_mdlz_tms_report_25_order WHERE vendor_short_name != '' ORDER BY 1
SELECT DISTINCT ops_location_to_province FROM analytics_workspace.mv_mdlz_tms_report_25_order WHERE ops_location_to_province != '' ORDER BY 1
